subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Thy letter hath been seen and thy mention hath been heard. God willing, through the outpourings of the Lord of Lords, thou shalt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد کتابت مشاهده شد و ذکرت استماع گردید انشاء الله از فیوضات رب الارباب بفصل
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
